summary.goal: Add GET /battles, GET /battles/{id}, and GET /battles/{id}/stream SSE endpoints (closes #14)
decisions: BattleDetail extends BattleSummary via inheritance rather than duplicating fields — keeps the two response shapes in sync with no extra code
SSE stream polls until battle is completed then replays turns with 1.5s delay — battles compute instantly so pacing is entirely client-side; this keeps computation and presentation cleanly separated
